circular.title: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks – Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025
circular.summary: These Directions mandate that all commercial banks in India establish a robust Asset Liability Management framework to manage liquidity and interest rate risks effectively. Banks are required to implement a tiered governance structure and maintain strict liquidity ratios. The framework involves conducting regular stress tests to ensure resilience against financial shocks.

clauses.text: These Directions are the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks – Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025, effective from the date of issue.
clauses.summary: Title and commencement of the Directions

clauses.text: These Directions apply to all Commercial Banks, including the State Bank of India and corresponding new banks, excluding SFBs, Payment Banks, and Local Area Banks.
Banks must maintain LCR (Stock of HQLA / Total net cash outflows over 30 days) at a minimum of 100% on an ongoing basis.
clauses.summary: Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) objective and definition

clauses.text: Banks must maintain NSFR (Available Stable Funding / Required Stable Funding) at a minimum of 100% on an ongoing basis.
clauses.summary: Net Stable Funding Ratio (NSFR) objective and definition

obligations.text: Maintain Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) at a minimum of 100%
obligations.plain_english: Banks must maintain a minimum LCR of 100% to ensure liquidity

obligations.text: Maintain Net Stable Funding Ratio (NSFR) at a minimum of 100%
obligations.plain_english: Banks must maintain a minimum NSFR of 100% to ensure stable funding

obligations.text: Conduct annual Board review of liquidity risk strategies and policies
obligations.plain_english: Banks must review liquidity risk strategies and policies annually
obligations.source_clause: 4. Conduct annual Board review of liquidity risk strategies and policies

prohibitions.text: Inter-bank Liability (IBL) shall not exceed 200% of Net Worth
prohibitions.plain_english: Banks cannot exceed 200% of Net Worth for Inter-bank Liability

definitions.definition: Stock of HQLA / Total net cash outflows over 30 days
definitions.plain_english: LCR measures a bank's ability to meet short-term liquidity needs

definitions.definition: Available Stable Funding / Required Stable Funding
definitions.plain_english: NSFR measures a bank's ability to fund assets with stable sources
